variants: Xoana Rioboo calls Rockwren Courtyard her home, though her journey began in the picturesque Owlpine Bay. Her academic pursuits led her to the esteemed Stormlog Conservatory, where she dedicated her education to mastering the art of Burmese characters. Presently, Xoana is a talented professional at Oasis Shard Products, applying her unique skills in her daily work. The rich cultural backdrop of Owlpine Bay continues to shape her creative expression, fostering innovation in her field. With each passing day in Rockwren Courtyard, Xoana enriches her life as an individual and a dedicated employee.
